articles.headline: U.S. Business AI Adoption Tops 20% as Nearly a Quarter of Firms Plan Integration Within Six Months
articles.summary: Goldman Sachs Global Investment Research reports that over 20% of U.S. businesses now integrate AI into operations, with nearly 25% of firms expecting to adopt the technology within the next six months, signaling rapid operational scaling for SMEs and corporations.

articles.headline: TSMC Plans Additional $100 Billion U.S. Expansion Despite Construction Worker Shortages
articles.summary: Major chipmaker TSMC announced a new $100 billion investment to expand its Arizona manufacturing facilities to meet multi-year AI chip demand, though executives warn a shortage of construction workers could delay timelines and impact supply chain reliability.

articles.headline: Entrust Launches Agentic AI Trust Accelerator to Move Autonomous Agents from Pilot to Production
articles.summary: Entrust introduced a co-development program helping enterprises deploy autonomous AI agents safely into production, addressing the critical operational risk and compliance challenges businesses face when scaling agentic AI beyond pilot projects.
